text: Due to a lack of recent comparable sales in Clinton, IL, an extensive search was made to find comparables in Clinton, IL and the competing community of Lincoln, IL. The comparables were selected to demonstrate the marketability of houses of a similar age and design that have been recently updated to appeal to a similar market segment as the subject. Due to recent market trends the comparables have received a market time adjustment of 6.6% based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its site size, age, GLA, basement finished room count, main floor bedroom, garage space count, and patio. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its site size, age, inferior condition, bathroom count, GLA, main floor bedroom, and enclosed porch. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its site size, bathroom count, GLA, lack of a garage, shed, and fence. See Comparables #4 & #5.
